name: web-swift
description: Swift UI on Web Components API based by TypeScript.
author: Mengobs

scripts.build:
tsc
rollup --config rollup.config.mjs
cp -r dist/webswift.js docs/overrides/js
cp -r dist/webswift.js webswift.js
scripts.docs:
mkdocs build
cp -r assets site/docs
cp -r assets site/docs/checkbox
scripts.push:
git add .
git commit -m "Update"
git push
cd site
git add .
git commit -m "Update docs"
git push origin docs
